## Slanni Mercenaries

#### 0-1 Aeon Warrior (Cost: 6 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Aeon Warrior | 6”/Infantry | \+2 | \+2 | \-2 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Aeon Warrior is equipped with Ceremonial Armour, a Temporal Cannon, and a Stasis Staff. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Ceremonial Armour.** \-2 INJURY MODIFIER, HEAVY. Due to its bulk, even a STRONG wearer rolls only a D3 for extra charge distance instead of a D6.  
* **Temporal Cannon.** 18”, HEAVY, RELOAD, TWO-HANDED, instead of rolling on the Injury table the target gains 6 STUN MARKERS  
* **Stasis Staff.** Melee, \+2 INJURY DICE, IGNORE ARMOUR, NONLETHAL, STUN MARKERS, STUN, causes an additional STUN MARKER due to the STUN Keyword

**Abilities**

* **Timeless.** The Aeon Warrior cannot suffer STUN Markers.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, SLANN, STRONG

#### 0-1 Cold-Blood Hover Platform (Cost: 6 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Cold-Blood Hover Platform | 10”/Flying | \+1 | \+0 | \-2 | 50mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Cold-Blood Hover Platform is equipped with light armour plating, a Scatter Cannon, and a Glaive. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Scatter Cannon.** 36”, AUTOMATIC 3, HEAVY, RELOAD, TWO-HANDED  
* **Glaive.** Melee, BLOCK, TWO-HANDED

**Abilities**

* **Field Generator.** \-1 of the Cold-Blood Hover Platform’s Armour has IMPERVIOUS. In addition, the Hover Platform treats any Down result from the Injury Roll Table as a Minor Hits instead. This does not apply to Down results that already replaced another result, such as with TOUGH.

**Keywords**  
FLYING, LARGE, NO PROMOTION, SLANN, STRONG, VEHICLE

#### 0-1 Hrud (Cost: 6 Glory)

A Pirate Crew (no Variant) Warband may also take this mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Hrud | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | \-1 | 25-28mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Hrud is equipped with organic armour, a Hrud Fusil, and two Entropic Blades. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Hrud Fusil.** 18”, \+1 INJURY DICE, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, PSYCHIC, RISKY  
* **Entropic Blade.** Melee, IGNORE ARMOUR

**Abilities**

* **Entropic Field (PSYCHIC).** All Success Rolls made by enemies within 8” of the Hrud are Risky.  
* **Out of Time.** All attacks made against the Hrud have \-1 DICE.  
* **Timewarp.** As an Action with a Risky Success Roll with \+1 DICE, the Hrud can attempt to teleport. On a success, you can pick up the Hrud and deploy it on the battlefield anywhere within 6" of the location it originally occupied (measured from the centre of its base to the centre of its base). If this is impossible for any reason, the Hrud  must stay in its original position. Note that the Hrud  can redeploy even if it is Down or within 1" of an enemy model (in which case the enemy model cannot make a Melee Attack before the Deathmaster is redeployed), and can deploy within 1" of an enemy model.  
* **Toxic Skin.** Whenever an enemy model hits the Hrud with a melee attack, that enemy suffers 1 BLOOD MARKER. A model with NEGATE GAS is immune.

**Keywords**  
FEAR, HRUD, NEGATE GAS, STEALTH

#### 0-1 Sunblood (Cost: 4 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Sunblood | 6”/Infantry | N/A | \+2 | \-2 | 40mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Sunblood is equipped with an Energy Field, a Shield, a Celestite Warmace, and Hypertoxin Grenades. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Celestite Warmace.** Melee, \+1 INJURY MODIFIER, HEAVY, IGNORE ARMOUR on a Critical Hit, TWO-HANDED

**Abilities**

* **Predator.** The Sunblood has VICIOUS 11 with melee attacks against a target with 1 or more BLOOD MARKERS.  
* **Primal Rage.** BLOOD MARKERS cannot be spent on the Sunblood’s attacks. In addition, while it has 3 or more BLOOD MARKERS, the Sunblood has \+1 DICE to Hit with all attacks.  
* **Scent of Weakness.** It costs 1 fewer BLOOD MARKER for any model to cause a Bloodbath against an enemy within 1” of the Sunblood.

**Keywords**  
SLANN, STRONG
